pr.title: Record: 11L VR + GA + LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT (val_bpb=pending)

output.summary: Adds Value Residual, Gated Attention, and LeakyReLU² to the 11L stack with legal score-first TTT scoring each chunk before training.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT trains on validation chunks only after scoring them, so training uses validation shards explicitly.
techniques: Value Residual and Gated Attention atop 11L stack
LeakyReLU(0.5)² in MLP for preserved gradients
Legal score-first TTT scoring each chunk before training
